name: trace-work-report-system
description: Front-end/back-end separated work report system with SQLite persistence and Office exports.

scripts.test: node --test --experimental-strip-types --experimental-specifier-resolution=node backend/test/configDeletion.test.ts backend/test/validation.test.ts frontend/test/abilityDimensions.test.ts frontend/test/configOptionDrafts.test.ts frontend/test/dashboard.test.ts frontend/test/growthReview.test.ts frontend/test/recordFormState.test.ts frontend/test/styles.test.ts
